source.title: Interleukin gene polymorphisms and alopecia areata: A systematic review and meta-analysis

description: IL2RA rs3118470 is an intronic T>C polymorphism associated with increased risk of alopecia areata. The CC genotype increases autoimmune-mediated hair loss risk through altered IL-2 receptor signaling.

TT.recommendation: Standard hair and scalp health; baseline assessment only

TC.recommendation: Baseline dermatologic evaluation; monitor for patchy hair loss; education on stress management; early treatment if disease develops

CT.recommendation: Baseline dermatologic evaluation; monitor for patchy hair loss; education on stress management; early treatment if disease develops

CC.effect: Homozygous for risk allele; substantially increased autoimmune hair loss susceptibility
CC.recommendation: Regular dermatologic monitoring; early intervention recommended; topical corticosteroids or minoxidil; intralesional corticosteroids if patches develop; counseling on psychological impact; platelet-rich plasma or JAK inhibitors for severe cases
